sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4591" key="a)logiste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλογιστ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n4591.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lose one's senses, rave,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.656d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.3</biblScope></bibl>, Vett. Val.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
